2*%.0f*x/%.5f*exp(-x^2/%.5f)+%.0f*x+2*%.0f*x/%.5f*exp(-x^2/%.5f)
2*popt[2]*smooth_x/popt[0]*np.exp(-smooth_x**2/popt[0])+popt[1]*smooth_x+2*popt[4]*smooth_x/popt[3]*np.exp(-smooth_x**2/popt[3])
2*61074801*x/2.57885*exp(-x^2/2.57885)+1298732*x+2*31448906*x/0.28214*exp(-x^2/0.28214)
[35070428 67355306 59263596 46691451 40431435 32678302 26979355 23305902

  5397703  5027242  4214352  4741086]
